title: MikroTik RouterBOARD LHG-5axD, LHG 5 ax
description: The LHG 5 ax is a compact and lightweight wireless device with Wi-Fi 6 support for the 5 GHz band , featuring an integrated 24.5 dBi high-gain grid antenna designed for excellent wind resistance. It is ideal for point-to-point links or as a client unit for long-distance connections. The unit includes a Gigabit Ethernet port with passive PoE support in the 12â28 V range The 802.11ax standard brings key improvements for long-distance wireless links â including higher spectral efficiency, advanced modulation (1024-QAM), and lower latency. The result is better performance even in noisy environments and faster, more stable connections over greater distances. Combined with WPA3 encryption and the modern RouterOS v7 operating system, the LHG ax series is ready to tackle the demands of todayâs wireless networks Compared to conventional solutions, the LHG 5 ax features an integrated radio unit located directly in the antennaâs focal point, eliminating any RF cable losses The device comes in a compact and easy-to-assemble package , making transportation and installation simple Device Power adapter 24V / 0.38A PoE injector Faston connector for grounding (2) metal hose clamps Antenna tilt mounting kit
